# PERF-80 negative: Pluck is bounded with Limit
lang: go
file: PERF-080-safe.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Email string
}

func RecentEmails(db *gorm.DB) ([]string, error) {
	var emails []string
	err := db.Model(&User{}).Limit(1000).Pluck("email", &emails).Error
	return emails, err
}
